Home�Services� Compliance
Service

Compliance &
Risk Assessment

Compliance should strengthen your security posture, not exist as a separate exercise. Our practice helps organizations prepare for audits, close security gaps, and build sustainable programs that satisfy regulatory frameworks while delivering genuine protection.

Pass the Audit. Strengthen the Program.

Many compliance engagements conclude with a spreadsheet of findings and no path forward. Our practice stays through implementation � ensuring organizations understand their exposure, prioritize remediation effectively, and build sustainable security processes that satisfy auditors while genuinely improving their defensive posture.

Whether an organization is preparing for its first SOC 2 audit, maintaining ISO 27001 certification, or navigating the intersection of multiple overlapping frameworks � we provide clarity, structure, and a clear path to compliance.

Capabilities

  • Security risk assessments and comprehensive gap analysis
  • SOC 2 Type I and Type II readiness preparation
  • ISO 27001 implementation and certification support
  • HIPAA security rule compliance assessments
  • FedRAMP authorization support
  • Security policy and procedure development
  • Control implementation and documentation
  • Third-party vendor risk assessments
  • Board-level risk reporting and executive briefings

Who We Serve

Organizations preparing for their first compliance audit. Enterprises that require remediation following a failed assessment. Businesses whose clients or partners are requiring SOC 2 or ISO 27001 certification. Healthcare providers navigating HIPAA requirements. Any organization that needs to demonstrate security maturity to customers, partners, or regulators.

Frameworks

  • SOC 2 (Type I & II)
  • ISO 27001
  • HIPAA
  • FedRAMP
  • NIST CSF
  • PCI DSS
  • CMMC

Start Your Assessment

Let's identify your gaps and build a practical remediation plan.

Schedule Assessment
